architectural_state.true_taheng_grepo: CSS Strict 16px Barong L-Frame (var(--champagne)) on top + left edges with complex inset box-shadows. Scroll-settle transition: flattens during scroll, deeply embossed when settled.
architectural_state.canvas: WebGL Ambient Texture Shader (Background Gradient Glow) from 21st.dev — Piña Ecru to Champagne glow. Injected via Vanilla JS Canvas behind Squarespace native layout.
architectural_state.calado_grid: Tone-on-tone 1px Piña Ecru border with 12x12px SVG Calado Star corner tacks.
architectural_state.wordmark: Pure Obsidian #111112. Negative Space Calado knockout.
architectural_state.cta: Commission KTHA — Embroidered Tag CTA. Delicate border rgba(138,62,49,0.3). Typewriter key hover.

palette_mandate.rule: 11 canonical tokens only. No pure #fff, no pure #000, no #F9F6F0 Alabaster, no legacy OAX tokens.

squarespace_strategy.details: We build around the pre-set architecture. Clone SS layout locally into KATHA_BRAND_PROPOSAL.html. Hotlink media from images.squarespace-cdn.com. Inject WebGL shader into the local clone. Once verified, port the CSS/JS script to SS Code Injection -> Header. Do not delete native blocks.

phase_1.title: Crème de la Crème Architecture & Media Strategy
steps: Audit existing SquareSpace site to inventory all assets.
Finalize visual strategy: CSS L-Frame, Calado Grid, Typography.
Generate KATHA_BRAND_PROPOSAL.html as the locked blueprint.

phase_2.title: The Diamond Heist (Squarespace Forgery)
steps: Extract live SS DOM structure and CDN links via Chrome DevTools.
Rebuild exact SS clone locally in KATHA_BRAND_PROPOSAL.html.
Adapt 21st.dev React shader into Vanilla JS/CSS for local injection.
Verify multi-page prototype with local navigation and hotfixes.

phase_3.title: Ghost Injection Deployment
steps: Port katha_taheng_override.css to Squarespace Custom CSS.
Inject L-Frame overlay HTML and background canvas JS into Code Injection Header.
Validate live environment render using chrome-devtools.

phase_4.title: Next.js / Supabase CRM Integration
steps: Configure Next.js API route to receive SquareSpace webhooks.
Map lead data payload to Supabase schema.
Trigger Resend email with CRM sync to HoneyBook.
Final testing and handoff to Jed.

project_topography.photobooth-template-studio: The core Next.js application, React canvas, Resend email config, and Supabase integration (book.kathabooth.com). All frontend logic lives here.
project_topography.squarespace_injection: CSS overrides and visual modifications for the public Squarespace site (kathabooth.com).
project_topography.scripts: Agent operational scripts, pipeline execution, and HCL sync tools.
project_topography.brand_assets: Approved, canonical design iterations, SVGs, and brand books.
project_topography..claude: Local agent persistent memory and state dumps.

strict_boundaries: Markdown manifestos must remain in project root — moving them breaks CC orchestration chain
BRAND_GENESIS_PLAN.md is OUTDATED — preserved for history only, do NOT boot from it
Do not touch Front End Gallery without permission
Do not touch Admin Panel without permission
Do not touch Subdomain architecture without permission

agent_directives.ag_vault: /Volumes/samsung 970 pro - Data/KATHA_VAULT/knowledge/ — This is the single source of truth. AG reads and writes here only.
